summary.summary: Updates the repository .github/CODEOWNERS file to add two GitHub handles, @kingst and @marionbarker, to the existing CODEOWNERS line. The change is recorded in PRs and commits: pr:gordolio/Trio#1182, pr:nightscout/Trio#1182, commit:04d24cfee9ae768800e965e869bb237f8bcbcde1, and commit:62956be6cace2713aef5b2f0d8011ff4fe254f4c; the file change is shown in file:ab525829a37e and diff:da3c5d8df259.
summary.userFacingImpact: No runtime or functional behavior changes are indicated by the provided sources. The change modifies repository ownership metadata (the CODEOWNERS file) by adding @kingst and @marionbarker, which affects code review/ownership assignment in the repository rather than application behavior (see file:ab525829a37e and diff:da3c5d8df259).
